programme.title: Jaan-E-Mann: Let's Fall in Love... Again
programme.desc: To avoid paying a hefty alimony, Suhaan (Salman Khan) thinks of getting his ex-wife Pia (Preity Zinta) remarried. For that, he convinces Pia¡¯s simpleton college friend Agastya Rao (Akshay Kumar) that he can still marry his college crush. He then helps Agastya to woo Pia, but ends up falling in love with her all over again.

programme.title: Talaash: The Hunt Begins¡¦
programme.desc: Young Arjun¡¯s father gets killed by mafia and they also take away his younger sister. Afterwards, his mother also goes insane. Vowing revenge, Arjun grows up to be a high-profile vigilante for police and sets out on a mission to find his sister.

programme.title: Fever
programme.desc: Armin Salem loses his memory in an accident and only remembers his name. One day, he starts getting visions of a murder and fears that he might have committed the crime, until he meets a woman who helps him uncover the truth. But can she be trusted?

programme.title: Ghaatak Returns
programme.desc: Gautham doesn't believe in flirting but his friend Kannan is a compulsive flirt. Gautham finally falls in love with Sandhya, Kannan's cousin and the girl Kannan's parents want him to marry.

programme.title: Captain
programme.desc: V P Sathyan, a professional Indian footballer, goes through various ups and downs in his career as he strives hard to fulfil his ambitions.

programme.title: Woh Ek Din
programme.desc: An entire day is wiped off the memory of Sahasra and she only realises the fact when unidentified men try to kill her. She must now race against time to piece together that one missing day which has thrown her life out of order.

programme.title: Citizen
programme.desc: Antony assumes several identities and kidnaps three government officials in order to succeed in his secret mission. However, a CBI officer sets out to find the real identity of the kidnapper.

programme.title: Teen Idol Tom
programme.desc: Actress Fiona Torrant is one of the elite orphans selected by the exclusive and powerful Font, the nations only academy for the arts, where stars are regularly groomed for enormous fame.

programme.title: Hit-and-Run Squad
programme.desc: Min-jae, a rookie police officer with a natural born talent for driving, is assigned to the perfect team: the Hit-and-Run Squad. But at the same time, for police detective Si-yeon, it is a place she is unjustly demoted to for doing her job. The two team up to arrest the rich and powerful speed maniac Jae-chul who is suspected of committing crimes for his obsession for speed.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Ki-joon and Hee-yeol become best friends at the police academy, despite differences in their personality. During their outing, they witness a kidnapping incident and report it to the police right away. However, because of the lack of evidence, the investigation doesn't progress while precious time is being wasted. Ki-joon and Hee-yeol decide to take the investigation into their own hands. The only problem is they have zero experience in a real investigation.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Masters of the Sky
programme.desc: The masters of the sky are the winged predators of the aerial world. They have evolved as master predators.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: The Arctic is alive with a fascinating assortment of wildlife species, hardy breeds uniquely suited to cold.

programme.title: Great Grasslands: American Prairie
programme.desc: This episode explores the wildlife of American prairies and grasslands that spread all across North America.

programme.title: Jungles of Asia
programme.desc: Asia is home to some of the most beautiful rainforests, jungles, and wildlife. Sadly, they are threatened.

programme.title: High Up in the Jura Mountains
programme.desc: There is so much to discover in the Swiss Jura mountains. It's is a natural landscape with many facets.

programme.title: Through the Seasons in the Jura Mountains
programme.desc: The Jura region in the Swiss Romandy has a surprisingly diverse natural landscape.

programme.title: Lake Maggiore
programme.desc: Great crested grebes and lizards are evidence of just how wild nature can be at Lake Maggiore.

programme.title: Wild Ticino
programme.desc: Ticino, an area of Northern Italy, has an immensely varied natural landscape.

programme.title: Graubuenden in Winter
programme.desc: Ibex, marmots, and common vipers all have different strategies for surviving winter's icy grip.

programme.title: Along the Aare River
programme.desc: Explore the Aare, the longest river whose entire course lies within Switzerland.

programme.title: The Bernese Oberland
programme.desc: Nature in the Bernese Oberland is marked by pretty alpine meadows with colorful flowers and rugged rocks.

programme.title: Days of Eternal Light
programme.desc: In summer, one of the coldest regions on earth turns into a paradise for animals.

programme.title: A Summer With Polar Bears at Hudson Bay
programme.desc: This episode accompanies the polar bears during the ice-free, colorful summertime.

programme.title: Summertime Wilderness
programme.desc: During its brief summer, Hudson Bay offers ideal living conditions for numerous animals and plants.

programme.title: Season of New Beginnings
programme.desc: Stocking up energy and breeding are the major challenges for wild plants and animals that accompany spring.

programme.title: Time for Awakening
programme.desc: For wild animals in Central Europe, early springtime is time to gain energy and produce offspring.

programme.title: Dog Men
programme.desc: In a not-too-distant future only a few homo sapiens are left. Struggling for survival they are forced to live from hunting the last remaining animals in the peripheral ruins of an advanced human civilization. But they are unaware of being stalked themselves by a mysterious scanner. A science-fiction story about hunting and being hunted, about extinction and survival, about dogs - and men.

programme.title: Dolce Vita
programme.desc: A Series of stories following a week in the life of a philandering tabloid journalist living in Rome.

programme.title: DOMESTIC
programme.desc: Domestic is a story about people who eat the animals they love and animals who love people unconditionally. A rabbit, a hen, a cat, a dog and a dove pass through the lives of the main characters and influence their evolution.

programme.title: Don't Fade Away
programme.desc: Life was easy for Jackson White (RYAN KWANTEN). With looks, brains, and athletic ability, the possibilities seemed endless. But when he came to New York City to pursue a career in the music industry, he was so seduced by money and status that he lost track of who he was. Now, with both his personal and professional lives on the brink of disaster, he retreats home to care for his dying father (BEAU BRIDGES). While in North Carolina, he confronts the friends he lost track of and the girl he left behind (MISCHA BARTON).

programme.title: The Giza Pyramid Complex, Egypt
programme.desc: Around the ancient capital city of Memphis, in Egypt, located just south of modern-day Cairo, are the greatest and strangest structures ever created by humankind, The Egyptian Pyramids. As a World Heritage Site, and one of the Seven wonders of Ancient World, The Giza Pyramids is the pinnacle of engineering and architecture ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Capital Cities and Tombs of the Ancient Koguryo Kingdom, China
programme.desc: Located in and around the city of Ji'an, Jilin province, in People's Republic of China, rests the 'Capital Cities and Tombs of the Ancient Koguryo. It is the name given to a historical site that houses archaeological remains of three ancient cities and 40"&" tombs all belonging to the ancient Koguryo kingdom.

programme.title: Stamboli's Countryhouse, Crimea
programme.desc: Stamboli Villa is the most beautiful building in the city of Feodosia, located in the Crimean peninsula. It was built from 1909 to 1914. According to the legend, its creator was the leader of the Vienna secession, Otto Wagner. The cottage in Moorish style"&" was built on the order of tobacco manufacturer Josef Stamboli.

programme.title: Kaleto Archaeological Complex Vrachanski Balkan Nature Park, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Located in northwestern Bulgaria, in the Vratsa Province, Mezdra is a small, picturesque town sitting along the left bank of the Iskar River. Discover the historical heritage of a living city: the Kaleto Archaeological Complex and the Vrachanski Balkan Na"&"ture Park. They are containing karst landscapes and habitats with more than 600 caves.

programme.title: The Dormition of the Mother of God Cathedral in Varna, Bulgaria
programme.desc: The Dormition of the Mother of God Cathedral is the largest cathedral of Varna and one of the most impressive sites in the city. With its height of 38 meters, the Dormition of the Mother of God is one of the tallest churches in Bulgaria and certainly one "&"of the most important in the country's long history.

programme.title: Plovdiv, The city on seven hills, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Few places have a history like Plovdiv. Its hilly landscape bears the marks of many great civilizations – from the mysterious Thracian tribes, to ancient Greece and Persia, to the Roman Empire, all the way to the Bulgarian Empire, the Ottomans and even Ts"&"arist Russia. In fact, Plovdiv is one of the oldest cities in Europe.

programme.title: Old City of Mostar, Bosnia and Herzegovina
programme.desc: The biggest Mosque in Kyrgyzstan and Central Asia is The Central Mosque. Located at the intersection of diverse cultural influences, it is a masterpiece in Islamic Art and Architecture

programme.title: Ethno Village-Museum Ljubacke Doline, Bosnia & Herzegovina
programme.desc: Exploring different cultures and experiencing lives utterly different from yours is the best part of discovering new horizons. This kind of experience can be done in one particular place in Bosnia & Herzegovina called Ljubacke Doline. Well, you can transl"&"ate it literally by Kisses Valley. This place is one of the many Ethno villages in the region.

programme.title: Tigre, the Puerto de Frutos, Argentina
programme.desc: The architectural ensemble of Tigre's rowing clubs is a World Heritage site. The unique factor was the pluralism of nationalities and cultural trends that existed in Argentina at the beginning of the 20th Century, something evident in the architectural ex"&"pression…

programme.title: Andros Town, Andros Island, Cyclades, Greece
programme.desc: Discover Andros Town, the capital of Andros' Island… A city with a significant century-long history, with monuments, churches, and ruins scattered all over the streets, witnessing its long cultural heritage. Andros Town is nothing like a Cycladic capital.

programme.title: Preza Castle & the Xhamia Preze Mosque, Albania
programme.desc: Preza is one of the most scenic areas of the valley of Tirana. While the Castle has inspired countless stories and legends, its own history will always be dominated by the golden era of the national hero Skanderbeg's resistance against the Ottomans.

programme.title: Supersized Structures
programme.desc: This episode shows how technique, technology, and ambition have developed some of the most magnificent structures in the world.

programme.title: GRAND CANYON Part 2
programme.desc: Eric Hanson's perilous Grand Canyon adventure continues after having taken an unexpected and dangerous turn.

programme.title: Kayaking the Okefenokee National Wildlife Refuge Pt. 1
programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the alligator-filled waters of the 438,000 acre Okefenokee swamp in Georgia.

programme.title: Kayaking the Okefenokee National Wildlife Refuge Pt. 2
programme.desc: Ken Whiting goes deep into the alligator-filled waters of the Okefenokee swamp on a 3-day kayak camping trip.

programme.title: Remember Lone Star State
programme.desc: The Fieris' road trip goes through Texas where the family tours the Alamo and enjoys a meal prepared by chef Robert Irvine in honor of the troops before skydiving with members of the special forces.

programme.title: Gulf Dreams
programme.desc: The Fieri's continue their road trip with a stop in Corpus Christi, TX, where they search for snapper in the Gulf for a fish fry before hooking up with Chef Aaron Sanchez in New Orleans.

programme.title: To Shining Sea
programme.desc: The Fieri family continues their road trip with a stop in Fairhope, AL, where Guy and Hunter wade into the Gulf to harvest oysters for a pop-up dinner before heading to Florida to explore the Everglades.

programme.title: Adventure Cities Pensacola to Dallas
programme.desc: Seasoned travel writer Jonathan Thompson sets out to explore the adventurous sides of Dallas, Texas and Pensacola, Florida.

programme.title: Kayaking Alabama
programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the rivers, lakes and caves around Lake Guntersville, Alabama by kayak.

programme.title: Kayaking North Carolina
programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the beautiful rivers of North Carolina by sea kayak and inflatable kayak.

programme.title: Grand Junction: Bill's Spill
programme.desc: In mile-high alpine forests near Grand Junction, Raheim encourages IT analyst Bill to get back on the bike following an accident that left him with multiple broken bones. They also ride ski lifts, kayak lakes of snowmelt, and sip lavender gin.

programme.title: Wilmington, Delaware: Surf's Up
programme.desc: Touring Delaware, Raheim pushes Tatyanna to her limits above the trees before coming back to the ground to get a little history lesson and a fantastic local brew. And in this episode of firsts, Raheim is on his own to catch some waves.

programme.title: Tackling Snow, Sand, & Cold in Southern Utah
programme.desc: Raheim Robinson meets up with his buddy Clark Robinson (and no, they're not related) to see if their shared passion for outdoor adventures will endure three climates across three Counties in three days.
